horoscope: The importance of mutually supportive relationships is underlined by a sweet connection between Venus and Mars. Host a brainstorming session with your closest companions, dear Scorpio, creating a safe space to share hopes and dreams. Exchange feedback to inspire, motivate, and hold one another accountable. Take precautions to guard against unnecessary competition while Mercury aspects the nodes of fate and Pluto. Even mild goading could trigger unintentional rivalries, so make empathy and nurturing the main prerogative. Meditate on existing responsibilities when the Cancer Moon and Saturn square off this afternoon. You may need to relinquish some work or adjust your routines to encourage growth.

Emotionally charged dreams brew confusion as the Cancer Moon and Neptune square off, darling bull. Take a few moments to shake off sleep and set an intention for the day. You won’t have much time for rest while Venus and Mars align. Wishes manifest easily for those who dare to follow through on their visions. Focus on core desires to determine where your energy flows. Limit screen time when Mercury aspects the nodes of fate and Pluto, or valuable time will be lost. If social distractions persist, it may be necessary to retreat. Draw physical boundaries with the outside world once Luna squares Saturn this afternoon.

Don’t underestimate your own willpower, dear Gemini. As Venus and Mars form a magickal aspect, your wishes can affect the universe. The work you do internally and behind the scenes can dramatically reshape reality. Show up for yourself, and dreams will manifest quickly. Guard against negative self-talk while Mercury aspects the nodes of fate and Pluto. If you are brave enough to face perceived obstacles or limitations, Lady Luck will smile upon you. Focus on your immediate environment instead of trying to make an impression online when the Cancer Moon squares Saturn this afternoon.

A limitless energy follows you as the Cancer Moon and Jupiter align, dear Scorpio. Take your aspirations to the next level, and don't be afraid to swim in unfamiliar waters. Enthusiasm grows as opportunities trickle in, but you might not be able to accept them all. Recognize that taking on too much at once can diminish your quality of life when Chiron stirs. Being selective will show that you're a hot commodity, rather than an easy hire. Partnerships could emerge to shoulder your burdens after Gemini season kicks off this evening. Make time for self-care as you adjust to big changes while Luna enters Leo, aspecting Uranus and Mars.

Pull at the thread of your own ideas to unravel brilliance, dearest Taurus. A sweet union between the Cancer Moon and Jupiter sharpens your mind and communication skills. Owning your unique perspective will win you influence and the support of peers. Try not to overanalyze the day’s events while Chiron grows restless this evening, or you may start to backpedal. However, it’s important to recognize if your visions need some fine-tuning once Gemini season kicks off. Consider revising your work from the privacy of home when Luna enters Leo tonight, aspecting Uranus and Mars.

Boundaries may be crossed while the Leo Moon and Pluto face off, dear Scorpio. Bruised egos could cause you or loved ones to overstep. Take a breather if emotions intensify before testing the limits of your relationships. A more practical and cooperative energy emerges as the afternoon sets in, thanks to the sweet aspects between Luna, Mercury, and Saturn. Your willingness to sort through issues in a mature and evolved manner will strengthen connections, increasing the longevity of romantic or professional partnerships. Manifesting dreams might come with a catch when Venus squares Neptune. Consider how your responsibilities will shift with each milestone.

Lead with compassion so you might receive it in return, darling Taurus. You'll feel more sensitive than usual while the Leo Moon aspects Pluto, Mercury, and Saturn. Though it's necessary to put up the occasional wall, try not to live in a guarded state. Efforts to protect yourself may come across as cold, and you could inadvertently push away those who genuinely want to connect. A harsh square between Venus and Neptune may cause you to isolate further. Recognize if past hurts are causing you to project fears onto others, making it difficult to trust. If you're not ready to open up, focus on healing.
